title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
summary: Lead feature squads building secure, AI-assisted web platforms. Own architecture, delivery, and quality.
description: You will ship end-to-end product increments across web and API surfaces, pairing closely with design and platform teams. You will set engineering direction, keep quality high, and mentor teammates while staying hands-on.
responsibilities: Lead delivery of web features with secure-by-default patterns (feature flags, IaC, CI quality gates)
Design and review service and API contracts with product and design partners
Pair with platform to keep observability, cost, and performance budgets honest
Mentor engineers through design docs, pairing, and thoughtful code reviews
requirements: 5+ years building production web apps with TypeScript/React/Next.js
Solid backend foundations (Node, API design, databases, queues)
Experience with cloud infra and security basics (IAM, secrets, least privilege)
Comfort reading traces/logs and debugging performance issues
niceToHave: Experience with LLM apps (RAG, tool use)
perks: Wellness stipend and local holiday swaps

title: Applied ML Engineer
summary: Ship LLM and predictive features from data contracts to evaluation loops with strong MLOps hygiene.
description: You will prototype and productionize ML features with a focus on reliability, safety, and observability. You partner with product, data, and security to deliver grounded AI experiences.
responsibilities: Design retrieval and routing pipelines for LLM applications
Build eval harnesses and guardrails for prompts and agents
Productionize models with CI/CD, feature flags, and canary rollouts
Collaborate with security on data privacy, redaction, and compliance
requirements: 4+ years in ML/ML Ops with production launches
Python expertise and comfort with modern LLM tooling
Experience with embeddings/vector search and evaluation methodologies
Strong data engineering foundations (batch + streaming is a plus)
perks: Hybrid Tokyo office with travel support

title: Product Designer
summary: Design elegant, high-performing product experiences across web and mobile with strong systems thinking.
description: You will shape product experiences end to end: discovery, UX flows, visual systems, and motion. You collaborate tightly with engineers to keep designs buildable and accessible.
responsibilities: Run discovery with PMs and users to frame problems and hypotheses
Create flows, wireframes, prototypes, and production-ready UI specs
Evolve our design system with accessibility and motion standards
Partner with engineering to validate feasibility and polish quality
requirements: 3+ years in product design with shipped work
Strong systems and interaction design skills
Experience collaborating with engineers in fast-paced teams
Comfort with motion and accessibility best practices

title: Security Engineer
summary: Embed security by design—threat modeling, IaC guardrails, appsec automation, and incident playbooks.
description: You will harden our products and platform with secure defaults. You coach teams, build tooling, and keep incident readiness sharp.
responsibilities: Own threat models and drive remediation with product squads
Automate security checks in CI/CD and IaC pipelines
Run incident simulations and improve playbooks
Partner with clients on compliance and secure delivery
requirements: 4+ years in application or cloud security
Experience with IaC (Terraform/CDK) and CI/CD security tooling
Ability to influence engineering teams through coaching
Strong fundamentals in identity, secrets, and network controls

title: Open Application
summary: Don’t see the exact role? Tell us how you can help ship resilient, AI-forward products.
description: Share your craft, interests, and the kind of impact you want to make. We review every open application for future roles and projects.
responsibilities: Describe your craft, interests, and the impact you want to make
requirements: Portfolio, repo, or examples of work
perks: Compensation: Let's discuss based on craft and fit
We’ll reach out when there’s a strong fit
